title: athyrium majus
intro: Athyrium majus, also known as the large lady fern or autumn fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Athyrium genus and is commonly found in woodlands and shaded areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium majus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Athyrium majus can be made by infusing the dried leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
